description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) investigating intermittent application latency. You suspect the round-robin load balancer is 'sticky' and distributing traffic unevenly across the EC2 instances, causing one instance to become a bottleneck. Create and save a Graphite dashboard named 'Load Balancer Fairness' containing three visualizations. The 'Network Traffic Share' graph must display the percentage share of network inbound bytes for each instance (servers.ec2_instance_*.network.bytes_in) with legends showing the instance names. The 'Disk Write Share' graph must display the percentage share of disk write bytes for each instance (servers.ec2_instance_*.disk.write_bytes) with legends showing the instance names. The 'CPU Imbalance Magnitude' graph must display the absolute difference in CPU utilization between servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization and servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, with the series named 'CPU Gap'.
